analysis.consistency: High. The data structure is complete and consistent with typical spell record formats.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, includes standard spell components, and specifies exclusions (undead or constructs).

mechanics_review.school: Evocation (Appropriate for a powerful healing effect).
mechanics_review.range: 60 feet (Sufficient range for a mass effect).
mechanics_review.duration: Instantaneous (Appropriate for an immediate burst of healing).
mechanics_review.effect_assessment: Restores a massive amount of HP (700), splitable among multiple visible targets. Also removes blindness/deafness and diseases, adding significant utility beyond raw healing. The exclusion of undead and constructs is crucial and correctly implemented.
mechanics_review.class_compatibility: Cleric only (Appropriate for a signature high-level healing spell).

potential_issues: The 700 HP pool is extremely high and suggests this spell is intended for a high-power tier of play, possibly outside standard D&D 5e core rules if this value is custom, but mechanically sound as described.
recommendations: Verify the 700 HP figure against the intended game system baseline if deviating from standard published material.
